_comment: On-chain CertificateDatum — derived from sample_certificate.json. cert_hash = SHA-256(canonical JSON). All ByteArrays are hex-encoded here for readability.
_cert_hash_note: SHA-256 of the deterministically serialized sample_certificate.json
_issued_at_note: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) — matches Cardano slot time for auditability
_document_cid_note: IPFS CID of the full original PDF certificate from the issuer
